channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead fox, 12th March
item.description:
Fox dead by wheelie bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thorne Close, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The Swiftsdens way dump., 12th March
item.description:
A location that Lewisham council doesn't maintain. The fence is rotten and broken. There's loads of rubbish chucked in the bushes and these car mats that I reported about 4 months ago are still here. Why have green spaces if you are not going to maintain them correctly? It would be more efficient for you to just turn this into a wider pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swiftsden Way, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence fallen and damaging our gate, 12th March
item.description:
You have spectacularly failed to repair the perimeter fence around the open ground on King’s Hall Road to the extent that part of your fence has now fallen across our gate for Bailes Place and we are now missing its latch. Please fix the entire fence and paint it and when you are at it, please fix our gate and replace our latch. Thank you. We’ve been asking about the main fence being fixed for a long time and this is what happens when you don’t do anything about the requests.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bailes Place, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car Abandoned, 12th March
item.description:
A few cars seems to have been left abandoned in this parking area. No road tax. They also receive parking tickets everyday.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spurstowe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car Abandoned, 12th March
item.description:
A few cars seems to have been left abandoned in this parking area. No road tax. They also receive parking tickets everyday.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spurstowe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 3 Englands lane, 12th March
item.description:
There is a large dip across half of the road where the g5 cables were laid that has suddenly appeared in the last 2 weeks. It is very visible and causing huge vibrations/noise in the houses when the buses go by. I feel it is getting worse quite quickly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2B, England's Lane, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsafe & inconsiderate obstruction of highway, 12th March
item.description:
6 parking spaces on Avocet Mews have been obstructed by barriers and pile of rubble. Additionally, there is a fenced off pile of rubble on the path behind. This is a public highway. There is no mention of these works on the council's highways register. The pile of rubble is not fully fenced off. The site is not lit or coned off as per the council's licencing equirements to deposit building materials on the highway. This is also causing issues with residential parking

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avocet Mews, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box left on Station Road, 12th March
item.description:
Please could this be removed as it’s on the corner and it’s quite a busy thoroughfare and can cause issues for pedestrians, thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Mead Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign lights not working, 12th March
item.description:
At the start of Wensum Place, junction with Farleigh Avenue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wensum Place, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 12th March
item.description:
Please clear the dog fouling that has been spread all over this pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture, building rubbish, 12th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped a sofa, some wood & house clearance stuff along the school fence .. in 3 different spots. This area always has rubbish dumped here... Can you please treat it as a hot spot and for something to stop people dumping here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holmleigh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree vandalised, 12th March
item.description:
Someone has deliberately sawn a street tree outside numbers 22-23 West Bank. This is clearly not an accident

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Bank, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress, 12th March
item.description:
Mattress dumped on Faversham Road outside Mind Shop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa, 12th March
item.description:
Please can this dumped sofa be removed ASAP. This is a fly tipping hotspot, so more signage to warn against fly-tipping would be great.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Howden Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
